title: Adequate Training and Onboard Procedures to Maintain Mental Health
content: 39 and to Combat Workplace Harassment, Bullying, and Violence. Filipino seafarers 40 shall only board ships with policies, plans, programs and accessible procedures to 41 maintain mental health, and to eliminate and address harassment, bullying and violence 42 onboard ships. 43 44 The shipowner shall ensure a well-structured training program for cadets and new recruits 45 such as mentoring schemes, employee assistance programs, and an awareness program 46 on mental health to all seafarers onboard. 47 48 The shipowner shall provide preventive measures, and clear, safe and effective 49 complaints procedures against bullying, harassment and other workplace violence. 50 51 52 Registration of Seafarers 53 54
